description: Thirty dev-tool-safe planet seeds placed around the authored tier-spine stars using per-object anchor_star + anchor_offset placement.

seed_planet_001_vela.title: Vela 1-1
seed_planet_001_vela.scan_description: Authored world-seed planet near Tier 1 Star. Vela 1-1 is a barren contact marked for survey expansion.
seed_planet_001_vela.contact_text: Orbital contact available. Long-range scan recommends survey before approach.

orbit_event_listeners.title: Vela Archive Listener
orbit_event_listeners.summary: Install a normal range listener for the archive event after the planet scan confirms the signal.
orbit_event_listeners.message: A buried archive listener waits inside Vela 1-1 scan noise.

orbit_event_listeners.title: Vela Claim Listener
orbit_event_listeners.summary: Silently install a claim-notice listener in the background for later event processing.
orbit_event_listeners.message: A silent claim listener is staged from orbit.

orbit_discoveries.title: Subsurface Archive Trace
orbit_discoveries.summary: A repeating archive pulse leaks through fractured basalt below the dark limb.
orbit_discoveries.local_ai_hint: The pulse cadence is too clean to be weather. Treat it like a machine still trying to speak.

orbit_discoveries.title: Old Claim Telemetry
orbit_discoveries.summary: Dormant mining claim tags still answer from two crust scars near the planet's terminator.
orbit_discoveries.local_ai_hint: These claim tags were not abandoned cleanly. Someone stopped broadcasting before they stopped working.

orbit_interactions.label: Flag Archive
orbit_interactions.summary: Mark the archive pulse as an orbit investigation target.

orbit_interactions.label: Review Claims
orbit_interactions.summary: Review dormant mining claim telemetry without leaving orbit.

orbit_resource_sites.scan_summary: A compact cobalt-bearing lens sits below fractured basalt.

interactions.label: Deploy Rover
interactions.summary: Use a Planetary Resource Rover to improve this site's resource data.

interactions.label: Recovery Launch
interactions.summary: Use a Planet Recovery Launcher to send recovered materials to orbit.

surface_buildings.scan_summary: A low-power relay is active inside an old crater wall.

interactions.label: Inspect Relay
interactions.summary: Inspect the relay's signal pattern from orbit.

interactions.label: Mark Relay
interactions.summary: Mark the relay as a persistent surface target for later systems.

surface_buildings.scan_summary: An old open-cut mine still carries valid claim-tag telemetry.

interactions.label: Register Claim
interactions.summary: Register the old claim for later field work.

notes: Uses owner_type/object_type planet so WorldSeedBuilder routes these through install_planet_seed_objects().
Each planet carries its own anchor_star so objects can spread across multiple authored stars in one seed file.
can_land is false; these are contact/survey planets only unless later upgraded.
